---
title: "Social Comparison Project"
author: Michele Garbelotto
date: today
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true                 
    toc-location: left      
    theme:
      light: minty 
      dark: superhero
---

# Presentations

[Presentation: literature review and experimental designs](SC_Presentation.html)

[Presentation: material loss and gain in social comparison](SC_LossAndGainHp.html)
